title: cirsium ligulare var. albanum
intro: Cirsium ligulare var. albanum, also known as Alban Thistle or Italian Cirsium, is a variety of thistle plants native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cirsium ligulare var. albanum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and boost the immune system.
